chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Transfer Application No.D-02 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.03.2026 Mr. Raja Jawad Ali Sahar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shahzado Saleem A.P.G. = The report in this matter was called from the learned trial Court, but no report has been filed. Meanwhile, the learned A.P.G. states that the court is vacant and requests that the matter be transferred to any other competent Court having jurisdiction. The learned counsel for the applicant states that the trial has been pending for one and a half years, the charge has already been framed, and the matter is fixed for evidence. On the sole ground of the court being vacant, the instant transfer application has been filed, and the contentions raised by the counsel for the applicant are found to be genuine. In such circumstances, Special Narcotics Case No.02 of 2025 is hereby transferred from the Court of Additional Sessions Judge-I, Tando Adam, to any other competent Court having jurisdiction within the limits of District Sanghar. The instant application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
